_note: Pool of 1000 skills + 200 weaknesses for character generation. type:"skill" = learned ability, type:"weakness" = debility. rarity controls draw probability. max is skill's human cap (19 = average max, 22 = prodigy).

pool.name: Standing for long periods
pool.desc: Able to standing for long periods.

pool.name: Walking on flat ground
pool.desc: Able to walking on flat ground.

pool.name: Waiting turn to speak
pool.desc: Able to waiting turn to speak.

pool.name: Balancing on one foot
pool.desc: Able to balancing on one foot.

pool.name: Complete paralysis
pool.desc: Complete paralysis. Totally unable to move from the neck down.
pool.gm_note: God's Space provides a survival mechanism — GM discretion on what form it takes (mobility aid, sensory compensation, etc.)

pool.name: Full body paralysis
pool.desc: Full body paralysis. No voluntary movement at all, including facial muscles and eyes.
pool.gm_note: God's Space provides a survival mechanism — GM discretion on what form it takes (mobility aid, sensory compensation, etc.)

pool.name: Paralysis (partial)
pool.desc: Partial paralysis affecting some limbs but not all.
